title: OPERATION EXECUTIVE - AIR EXPORT
description:
Export Operations Executive – Freight Forwarding

We are looking for a detail-oriented and experienced Export Operations Executive to join our Company. The ideal candidate will manage end-to-end export operations and ensure smooth, timely, and compliant shipment handling.

Key Responsibilities

  • Export coordination of air freight shipments.
  • Preparing Documents and submitting to Singapore Customs.
  • Respond to phone, e-mail, or faxed and requests from clients, agents or outside sales representatives.
  • Handle bookings for consignee routed cargo as requested by our agents, shippers.  
  • Coordinate pickups and provide timely quotes for inland.
  • Obtaining estimated costs for unusual cargo such as oversize, dangerous goods and perishables. Follow up on cargo arrival at destination for pending inland arrangements.
  • Assist in any service requests from customers or agents as required by the line managers in the Air Freight Department.
  • Manages difficult customer situations. 
  • Responds promptly to customer needs. 
  • Solicits customer feedback to improve service.   
  • Responds to requests for service and assistance professionally. 
  • Speaks clearly and persuasively in positive or negative situations. 
  • Listens and gets clarification. Responds well to questions. 
  • Writes clearly and informatively. 
  • Able to read and interpret written information. 
  • Gives and welcomes feedback. 
  • Contributes to building a positive team. 
  • Follows policies and procedures. 
  • Completes administrative tasks correctly and on time. 
  • Supports organization's goals and values. 
  • Other competencies may be required according to assignments

postedCompany.description:
TIC Traffic International Consortium (S) Pte Ltd is founded by a team of experienced professionals who have more than 20 years' of experience in managing Air and Ocean freight forwarding services. Our team is capable of handling all kinds of shipments, be it garments/apparels, electronics, AOG, DG, OOG and more.

With the change in market demands, we focus on providing services to companies in the high-tech semi-conductors, aviation and aerospace, and the E-Commerce Industry. We possess the capability of handling sensitive laboratory equipment, personal effects, dangerous goods, as well as valuable cargo.

With our proximity advantage in the Free Trade Zone (FTZ) of Changi Airfreight Centre, our office and warehousing facility offers a seamless and reliable transhipment and re-exporting services via air or air-sea shipment services.

We pride ourselves in offering a one-stop service station for customs clearance and customers’ freight and shipping needs, offering port-to-port and door-to-door services across our ever-expanding network of agencies, spanning major international gateways and continents.
postedCompany.name: TIC TRAFFIC INTERNATIONAL CONSORTIUM (S) PTE. LTD.
